name: Business Central Integration
brief: Provides extended APIs and data endpoints for integrating Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central with external platforms.
description: This open-source extension enables advanced integrations between Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central and external systems such as Optiply integration pipelines. It provides a modular architecture for exposing additional APIs, queries, and tables — starting with inventory data (Items, Variants, and Locations) and designed to support future extensions for sales, purchasing, and other business domains.
